column1: # marker groups (same-family models sharing reference proteins) — built by scripts/build_marker_groups.py
# overlap_coef>=0.5, shared>=30; 74 groups, 241 grouped models, 548 singletons (singletons used as-is)
# flag: ok | no_annotation (clean but unannotated) | REVIEW_mixed (>=3 annotated members disagree -> check for over-merge)
# curation: an adversarial 4-agent group audit (2026-06-21) confirmed every combinable group is a true single
# gene family; CURATION in this builder applies its corrections (drop spurious bridge members e.g. OG5938 from
# mcp_ncldv; split over-merges grp_OG1357/grp_OG503; dissolve grp_OG5478; force-combine audit-cleared families).
# caps models (plv_mcp_caps_*, gamadvirusmcp_caps_*) are not yet in resources/database/faa; once their FAAs are
# built from the combined proteome they join (validated 2026-06-21, caps-HMM vs gvclass refs): PLV-class -> mcp_plv,
# NCV-like/Mriyavirus -> mcp_ncldv; ~15 novel caps groups (Alpenseevirus/Zephyrvirus/VC124-134/Pam2/Metamonada/...) add new refs.
